name: Feedback Licence
text: All feedback, suggestions, or improvements provided by a Party concerning the other Party's Intellectual Property shall be owned exclusively by the latter Party.
invalid_if: The feedback constitutes pre-existing Intellectual Property of the Party providing it.
The feedback is unrelated to the other Party's Intellectual Property.
The contract provides alternative ownership terms for such feedback.
title: IP Feedback
dispute_hotspots: Client claims product feature was their patented invention — feedback vs independent development
